# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kong no auth.
# Category: kong_no_auth

# kong.yml

services:
  - name: user-service
    host: user-service
    port: 80
    path: /user
    protocol: http
    connect_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000

  - name: product-service
    host: product-service
    port: 80
    path: /product
    protocol: http
    connect_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000

routes:
  - name: user-route
    protocols: [http, https]
    paths:
      - /user
    service: { id: user-service }
    upstream_url: http://user-service:80/user
    strip_path: true

  - name: product-route
    protocols: [http, https]
    paths:
      - /product
    service: { id: product-service }
    upstream_url: http://product-service:80/product
    strip_path: true

upstreams:
  user-upstream:
    hash_fallback: false
    hash_on: headers
    hash_on_headers: [X-Real-IP]
    loadbalancer:
      type: round-robin
      ratio: 1
      persistence_timeout: 30000
      retry_timeout: 60000
      max_connections: 1000
    servers:
      - url: http://user-service:80/user

  product-upstream:
    hash_fallback: false
    hash_on: headers
    hash_on_headers: [X-Real-IP]
    loadbalancer:
      type: round-robin
      ratio: 1
      persistence_timeout: 30000
      retry_timeout: 60000
      max_connections: 1000
    servers:
      - url: http://product-service:80/product

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_in_header: X-API-KEY
      key: your_api_key_here
